Operation 'ValidateEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic and lack actionable details. Improved version specifies real-time validation, explains inputs (email address), outputs (verdict and metrics), and provides context about use cases and authentication requirements for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: **This endpoint allows you to validate an email address.**
data.summary_suggestion: Validate a single email address in real-time
data.description_suggestion: Validates a single email address and returns detailed information about its validity. Accepts an email address as input and returns a verdict (valid, invalid, or risky) along with detailed validation metrics. Use this endpoint to verify email addresses in real-time during signup forms or data collection. Requires Email Validation API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and lack actionable details. Improved version specifies real-time validation, explains inputs (email address), outputs (verdict and metrics), and provides context about use cases and authentication requirements for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'ListEmailJobForVerification' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary was unclear about the presigned URL generation purpose. Description needed clarification on inputs (file_type parameter), outputs (upload_uri, upload_headers, content-type), and workflow context. Improved version makes it clear this is a workflow initiation step and provides better AI agent guidance on when and how to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Request a presigned URL and headers for Bulk Email Address Validation list upload.
data.current_description:
**This endpoint returns a presigned URL and request headers. Use this information to upload a list of email addresses for verification.**

Note that in a successful response the `content-type` header value matches the provided `file_type` parameter in the `PUT` request.

Once you have an `upload_uri` and the `upload_headers`, you're ready to upload your email address list for verification. For the expected format of the email address list and a sample upload request, see the [Bulk Email Address Validation Overview page](https://www.twilio.com/docs/sendgrid/ui/managing-contacts/email-address-validation/bulk-email-address-validation-overview).
data.summary_suggestion: Generate presigned URL for bulk email list upload
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a bulk email validation job by generating a presigned URL and request headers for uploading an email address list. Accepts file_type parameter (CSV or JSON) and returns upload_uri and upload_headers. The returned content-type header matches the specified file_type. This is the first step in bulk validation workflow - use the returned credentials to upload your email list. Refer to Bulk Email Address Validation Overview for expected file format and upload instructions.
data.reasoning: Summary was unclear about the presigned URL generation purpose. Description needed clarification on inputs (file_type parameter), outputs (upload_uri, upload_headers, content-type), and workflow context. Improved version makes it clear this is a workflow initiation step and provides better AI agent guidance on when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'GetValidationsEmailJobs' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary and description lack specificity about what data is returned. Improved version clarifies the return structure (array of job objects), what metadata is included, and the use case for monitoring jobs, making it more useful for AI agents.

data.current_summary: This request lists all of a user's Bulk Email Validation Jobs.
data.current_description: **This endpoint returns a list of all of a user's Bulk Email Validation Jobs.**
data.summary_suggestion: List all bulk email validation jobs
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all bulk email validation jobs for the authenticated user. Returns an array of job objects containing job metadata including job_id, status, creation timestamp, and validation results summary. Use this endpoint to monitor all active and completed bulk validation jobs. No parameters required.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about what data is returned. Improved version clarifies the return structure (array of job objects), what metadata is included, and the use case for monitoring jobs, making it more useful for AI agents.

message: Operation 'GetEmailJobForVerification' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description were vague about inputs and outputs. Improved version specifies the required job_id parameter, clarifies the return data structure (status, progress, results), and explains the use case for progress monitoring, enabling better AI agent decision-making about when to call this operation.

data.current_summary: This request returns a single Bulk Email Validation Job.
data.current_description: **This endpoint returns a specific Bulk Email Validation Job. You can use this endpoint to check on the progress of a Job.**
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific bulk email validation job status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific bulk email validation job by job_id. Returns job metadata including current status (pending, processing, completed, failed), progress metrics, validation results summary, and timestamps. Use this endpoint to monitor job progress and retrieve validation results once processing is complete. Requires job_id path parameter.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description were vague about inputs and outputs. Improved version specifies the required job_id parameter, clarifies the return data structure (status, progress, results), and explains the use case for progress monitoring, enabling better AI agent decision-making about when to call this operation.
